name: Jane Mwangi
quote: The IMDP completely transformed how I approach leadership. I came in thinking I knew what I needed — I left understanding what I didn't know I was missing.

name: David Osei
quote: Boot camp week was intense in the best possible way. In four days my entire business model was stress-tested and rebuilt. Worth every hour.

name: Amina Hassan
quote: The virtual incubator format worked incredibly well for me. I could apply what I was learning in real time without stepping away from my organisation.

name: Kofi Asante
quote: I attended the individual programme after a colleague recommended it. Simon has a rare ability to hold up a mirror and ask exactly the right questions.

name: Nadia Camara
quote: What sets IMDP apart is that it is genuinely African in its approach. The case studies, the peer group, the coaching — all of it was grounded in our real context.

name: Samuel Njoroge
quote: I joined the boot camp sceptical. I left with a 90-day plan I actually believed in and a network of peers I still lean on two years later.
